subject: Can't find dark mode setting
body: Hi, I've been looking everywhere in the settings for dark mode but can't find it. I thought it was added in the last update? Not urgent, just easier on the eyes for late-night work.
account_history: Customer since 2023. 2 prior tickets, both resolved. No open issues.

subject: API rate limits triggering unexpectedly on our batch jobs
body: We've been running nightly batch jobs against your API for 6 months without issues. Starting two days ago, jobs are hitting rate limits at about 30% of our normal volume. Nothing changed on our end. Our SLA requires these jobs complete by 6am. This is now a business-critical issue for us.
account_history: Enterprise customer since 2022. High-volume API user. Prior ticket about rate limits resolved with limit increase 8 months ago. Account manager: James W.

subject: URGENT: Authentication service returning 500 errors for all users
body: All users in our organization cannot log in. Authentication service is returning 500 errors. This started approximately 20 minutes ago at 9:14am PST. We have 400 employees completely locked out. Our incident commander is standing by. Need immediate escalation.
account_history: Enterprise customer since 2021. 400 seats. Last incident: none in 18 months. Status page shows no active incidents.
